description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.22 Docker image with three stages: build, test, and release. Add a build job named "build" in the build stage that runs the command "go build ./...". Add a test job named "test" in the test stage that runs "test -z \"$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)\"", then "go test -cover ./...", installs golangci-lint v1.59.1 via "curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin v1.59.1", and finally runs "golangci-lint run -v". Add a release job named "release" in the release stage that runs "./release.sh" and is triggered only when a Git tag is present (CI_COMMIT_TAG not null).
